title: Mockito argument matchers should be used on all parameters
description: All parameters in Mockito stubbing and verification should use argument matchers to avoid unexpected behavior and ensure test reliability.
recommendation: Use argument matchers (such as any(), eq(), etc.) for every parameter in Mockito methods like when(), verify(), or given(). Mixing raw values and matchers can lead to errors.
impact: Tests may pass or fail unpredictably if argument matchers are not used consistently, leading to unreliable test results.

checks.message: Use argument matchers (such as any(), eq(), etc.) for every parameter in Mockito methods like when(), verify(), or given(). Mixing raw values and matchers can lead to errors.
